title: Herbed Poached Salmon
description: A simple and healthy salmon dish flavored with fresh thyme and poached to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the salmon fillet under cold water and pat it dry with a paper towel.
Season the salmon with salt and pepper.
Add a few sprigs of fresh thyme to the poaching liquid (water or fish stock).
Place the salmon in the poaching liquid and bring it to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to a low temperature (around 145°F) and poach the salmon for 8-10 minutes or until it's cooked through.
Remove the salmon from the poaching liquid and place it on a plate.
Garnish with additional thyme sprigs if desired.
Optional: Add a dash of nourish to the poaching liquid for added flavor.
